pre_game.message: Hey, I'm I — thought I'd say hello before the game starts. What's your name and what brought you here?
I'm D — here to try and win some of the prize money to help out my family and friends. Nice to meet you.
Nice to meet you, D — I'm here to try to bring home money for my family too. Who in your family are you hoping to help most?
My little sister — she's in college and struggling with tuition and rent, so I'm hoping to cover more of her expenses.
That's really admirable — I hope you win; what is she studying?
She's studying nursing — wants to become a pediatric nurse.
That's wonderful — pediatric nurses make such a difference. How far along is she in the program?
She's a second-year student — just starting clinical rotations next semester.
That's great — clinical rotations are a big milestone; she'll do amazing. Is she excited or nervous about starting them?
She's both — excited for the hands-on experience but a little nervous about the responsibility; I think she'll do great.
That's great — with your support she'll do amazing. Good luck to both of you.
Thanks, I — I really appreciate it. Good luck to you too; I hope we both bring home the prize.
